name: Impostward - FNF Mistful Crimson Morning
description:
Featured artwork: https://x.com/Febby98341501/status/1788321804907430194

“It was a normal day at the Krusty Krab... Squidward was next to you manning the counter... before any of you could clock out... the bus stopped... It was someone who looked like a exact replica of Squidward albeit the skin was teal instead of blueish gray, and the replica’s shirt was a crusty brown and the worst part is... his head was like Squidward’s but soulless and thin... nearly alien like... With heavy shading always covering the left side of his face and having a empty gaping mouth ...”
creator: Quandary dingler
